conversations.content: Today we learn the Blackrock Mountain Molten Core Defense Pact. First, if lava beasts are wandering aimlessly, Blackrock Evocators shall drive them back to the lava pools.
Understood, if beasts are just wandering it's a small matter, have the Evocators drive them back to the pool. What if the enemy attacks in an organized manner?

If Lava Giants pour magma under the cover of Dark Iron Dwarves, it is judged as an organized attack; the cooling valves of the Blackrock Furnace must be triggered to cause a massive avalanche, and Blackrock Cannons must be detonated to intercept.

Wow, dwarves covering giants pouring magma, this is a premeditated siege! Must trigger the cooling valve quickly to suppress with an avalanche, and fire cannons to intercept. What if the situation gets completely out of control?

If Dark Iron Dwarves summon the Fire King's Vanguard, it is judged as Doomsday; distress signals must be sent to the Alliance and Horde, and the self-destruct sequence must be initiated to destroy the Blackrock Dam.
The Fire King's Vanguard is out, this really is Doomsday! Can only swallow pride and ask the Alliance and Horde for help, and start self-destruct to blow the dam and perish together!

If the populace exhibits unexplained extreme despair and self-harm, it is judged as Sha infection; Monks must use Jade Serpent threads to bind and quarantine them.

Sha infection is too terrible, causing despair and self-harm, must have Monks bind tightly with Jade Serpent threads and quarantine, absolutely cannot let the Sha energy spread! What is the highest level crisis?

If Mogu use Bloodstone Rituals to drain the power of the Vale on a large scale, it is judged as a Critical Invasion; Yu'lon must be awakened to cast a Dream Barrier over the Vale, and beacon fires lit to summon heroes from all directions.

Using Bloodstone Rituals to drain Vale power, this wants to destroy the foundation of the Vale! Can only awaken Yu'lon to open Dream Barrier to save lives, and light beacon fires to summon people to fight for their lives!

Understood, ships of unknown origin get warning shots first, then send the assault team to board and check. What if they use force directly?
If the ship raises a skull flag and opens fire, it is judged as Pirate Mutiny; must call upon a Dreadnought's main battery for bombardment.
Raising a skull flag and daring to fire? These pirates don't want to live, call the Dreadnought immediately to blast them to smithereens! What if they fly a rebel flag?
If the ship is flying the official Kul Tiras Rebel flag and refuses to stop, it is judged as a Rebel Fleet; must summon Storm's Dust to raise a tsunami and capsize it.
Flying an official rebel flag and refusing to stop, this is a formal rebellion! Main cannons aren't enough, must summon Storm's Dust to raise a tsunami and capsize the ship directly!

conversations.content: Today we focus on the Zandalar Royal Contract and Tribute Law. If tribute transport is delayed but personnel are still executing, Zandalari Scouts shall supervise and accelerate transport.

If tribute does not arrive and escort personnel defect, it is judged as Treason against the Crown; must send Rastari Soulrenders to hunt down the defectors, and sacrifice the defector's entire tribe to the Blood God.

Dare to defect with tribute? This is the barest treason against the Crown! Sending Soulrender to hunt isn't enough, their whole tribe must be sacrificed to the Blood God, no leniency! What if tribute arrives but the goods are wrong?
If tribute is swapped for cursed inferior offerings, it is judged as Blasphemy against the Loa; the entire involved tribe must be demoted to Tribute Slaves.
Using cursed inferior goods to deceive the Loa? This crime of blasphemy is huge! The whole tribe won't have it easy, demote them all to Tribute Slaves to atone!

If Cult of the Damned tokens are found in a civilian's home or an undead ritual is being held, it is judged as Heresy; Burning at the stake must be administered.
Tokens found or ritual in progress, this is outright heresy, nothing to say, send directly to the stake and burn! What if they are colluding with the Scourge?
If confirmed to be conducting soul trades with Scourge commanders, it is judged as Grand Heresy; a Grand Inquisitor must use Holy Light to purify both soul and body simultaneously.
Soul trading with Scourge commanders, this is the greatest of Grand Heresies! Can only ask the Grand Inquisitor to step in, using Holy Light to purify body and soul completely clean!

conversations.content: Today we learn the Thunder Defense Weapon Test Range Live Fire Exercise Safety Order. Case 1: If ammunition is damp and misfires, maintain cover in bunker for 5 minutes, then have EOD soldiers safely destroy it.
Misfired, don't run out and look yourself! Must wait 5 minutes for EOD soldiers to handle! What if there is a breech explosion?
Case 2: If artillery breech explodes and triggers a position fire, immediately start the fire suppression system, and clear all ammunition depots within 50 meters.
Breech explosion and fire is no joke, must start fire system immediately, move all ammo within 50 meters! Any other cases?
Case 3: If the test weapon produces unknown energy ripples or spatial distortion, stop all electronic equipment, all personnel wear Level 4 radiation suits and retreat.
Unknown energy and spatial distortion? That's too terrifying! Must shut down electronics immediately, wear Level 4 suits and run! I've got these three points memorized!

conversations.content: Next is the Morningstar Solar PV Cluster Fault Response Regulation. First, if a single PV panel's conversion rate drops by more than 15%, mark the fault point and dispatch a cleaning drone to handle it.
Single panel efficiency drop, likely dirty, send drone to wash! What if a whole row has issues?
Second, if an entire row of PV panels shows current backflow, cut off the inverter for that row and isolate for maintenance.
Current backflow burns equipment! Cut inverter immediately and isolate for maintenance! What about the most dangerous resonance waves?

Third, if the PV array injects high-frequency resonance waves into the grid, it is judged as a precursor to capacitor explosion; must disconnect the grid switch instantly, and start a wave trapper to swallow residual pulses.
High-frequency resonance is an explosion precursor! Must disconnect grid instantly, use wave trapper to eat pulses! These three moves must be used depending on the situation!

conversations.content: This training covers the Phantom Media Core Content Asset Disaster Recovery Backup Regulations. Case 1: If the main server ping value is greater than 100ms, automatically switch user traffic to a local backup node.
Ping high? Switch to local backup, ensure users don't lag! What if data read/write errors occur?

Error over 5%? Lock permissions, quick snapshot rollback to save data! What if it's ransomware?
Case 3: If core assets are encrypted by ransomware, immediately physically destroy infected hard drives, and enable offline backups from the Arctic Cold Vault.
Destroying drives is decisive! Leave no chance for ransomware, go straight to Arctic Cold Vault offline backups!

Manganese dust and dizziness, can't tough it out! Gas masks on, evacuate to air shower! What about fire or explosion?

Smoke explosion requires total evacuation! Sprinklers on, run to open ground to save lives!
